headerDisplay:
חשוב מאוד לקרוא את תנאי השימוש!

התוסף איננו תוסף רשמי של פיקוד העורף או מערכת הבטחון.

התוסף משתמש ב-API של פיקוד העורף לקבלת התרעות ולכן יתכנו שיבושים.

בכל מקרה יש להמשיך להשתמש באמצעיים הרשמיים של מערכת הבטחון.

Disclaimer:

1. This plugin is not an official Home Front Command product.

2. The plugin uses the Pikud HaOref public API for alerts. There may be delays or disruptions.

3. Always use the official alert systems alongside this plugin.

sensors.title: Sensors
sensors.description: Configure one or more sensors, each with different cities, categories, and settings.

name.title: Sensor Name
name.description: A unique name for this sensor (appears in HomeKit).

cities.title: Cities
cities.description: Select cities to monitor. Use the search to find cities from the Pikud HaOref list.

categories.title: Alert Categories
categories.description: Select which alert types to monitor. If none selected, all categories are enabled.

prefix_matching.title: Enable Prefix Matching
prefix_matching.description: When enabled, city names match by prefix.

turnoff_delay.title: Turn-Off Delay (ms)
turnoff_delay.description: Delay turning off the motion sensor after the alert ends. Useful to prevent rapid on/off. Default is 0 (instant), maximum is 1 hour (3600000ms).

alert_timeout.title: Alert Timeout (ms)
alert_timeout.description: Safety fallback: if 'Event Ended' is never received, the alert will auto-clear after this time. Resets when a new alert arrives. Default is 30 minutes.

polling_interval.title: Polling Interval (ms)
polling_interval.description: How often to check for new alerts. Lower values are faster but use more bandwidth.

request_timeout.title: Request Timeout (ms)
request_timeout.description: How long to wait for an HTTP source to respond before aborting the request. Increase if you have a slow network.

reconnect_interval.title: Reconnect Interval (ms)
reconnect_interval.description: Initial delay before reconnecting a WebSocket source after disconnect.

max_reconnect_interval.title: Max Reconnect Interval (ms)
max_reconnect_interval.description: Maximum reconnect delay after repeated WebSocket failures (exponential backoff cap).

ping_interval.title: Ping Interval (ms)
ping_interval.description: How often to send a keep-alive ping to WebSocket sources.

pong_timeout.title: Pong Timeout (ms)
pong_timeout.description: Max time to wait for a pong response before terminating the WebSocket connection.

custom_sources.title: Custom Alert Sources
custom_sources.description: Add custom HTTP or WebSocket alert sources alongside the built-in ones.

headers.title: Headers
headers.description: Custom HTTP headers as key-value pairs.

category_mapping.title: Category Mapping
category_mapping.description: Map source-specific category values to plugin categories.

message_type.title: Message Type Filter
message_type.description: Only process WebSocket messages with this type field.

message_data_field.title: Message Data Field
message_data_field.description: Extract alert data from this field of the WebSocket message.

health_check.title: Enable Health Check Sensor
health_check.description: Adds a Switch to HomeKit that turns OFF when all alert sources are unreachable.

health_check_threshold.title: Health Check Threshold
health_check_threshold.description: Consecutive failures per source before reporting unhealthy.

debug.title: Enable Debug Logs
debug.description: When checked, the plugin will produce extra logs for debugging purposes.
